mapper.select: SELECT MAX(ID) FROM MB_USER WHERE PHONE = #{customerPhone} AND ROLE = 'CUSTOMER'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MB_USER ( USERNAME, PASSWORD, NAME, EMAIL, PHONE, ROLE ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, 'CUSTOMER' )
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(ID) FROM MB_USER WHERE PHONE = #{customerPhone} AND ROLE = 'CUSTOMER'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MB_RESERVATION R JOIN MB_SERVICE_ITEM EXISTING_SERVICE ON EXISTING_SERVICE.ID = R.SERVICE_ID JOIN MB_SERVICE_ITEM NEW_SERVICE ON NEW_SERVICE.ID = #{serviceId} WHERE R.STATUS IN ('REQUESTED', 'CONFIRMED') AND R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME < #{reservationDateTime} + NUMTODSINTERVAL(NEW_SERVICE.DURATION_MINUTES, 'MINUTE') AND R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME + NUMTODSINTERVAL(EXISTING_SERVICE.DURATION_MINUTES, 'MINUTE') > #{reservationDateTime}
SELECT HOLIDAY_DATE FROM MB_HOLIDAY ORDER BY HOLIDAY_DATE
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO MB_HOLIDAY H USING (SELECT #{holidayDate} AS HOLIDAY_DATE, #{reason} AS REASON FROM DUAL) V ON (H.HOLIDAY_DATE = V.HOLIDAY_DATE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET H.REASON = V.REASON WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (HOLIDAY_DATE, REASON) VALUES (V.HOLIDAY_DATE, V.REASON)

INSERT INTO MB_RESERVATION ( SERVICE_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_EMAIL, CUSTOMER_PHONE, RESERVATION_DATE_TIME, NO_SHOW_POLICY_AGREED, STATUS, MEMO ) VALUES ( #{serviceId}, #{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{customerEmail}, #{customerPhone}, #{reservationDateTime}, #{noShowPolicyAgreed}, 'REQUESTED', #{memo} )
mapper.select: SELECT R.ID AS id, R.SERVICE_ID AS serviceId, S.NAME AS serviceName, S.CATEGORY AS serviceCategory, R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME AS reservationDateTime, R.STATUS AS status, R.MEMO AS memo FROM MB_RESERVATION R JOIN MB_SERVICE_ITEM S ON S.ID = R.SERVICE_ID WHERE R.CUSTOMER_PHONE = #{customerPhone} ORDER BY R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME DESC

SELECT R.ID, R.SERVICE_ID, S.NAME AS SERVICE_NAME, S.CATEGORY AS SERVICE_CATEGORY, S.DURATION_MINUTES, R.CUSTOMER_NAME, R.CUSTOMER_EMAIL, R.CUSTOMER_PHONE, R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME, R.NO_SHOW_POLICY_AGREED, R.STATUS, R.MEMO FROM MB_RESERVATION R JOIN MB_SERVICE_ITEM S ON S.ID = R.SERVICE_ID WHERE R.ID = #{reservationId} AND R.CUSTOMER_PHONE = #{customerPhone}
mapper.update: UPDATE MB_RESERVATION SET SERVICE_ID = #{serviceId}, RESERVATION_DATE_TIME = #{reservationDateTime}, MEMO = #{memo}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{reservationId} AND CUSTOMER_PHONE = #{customerPhone} AND STATUS IN ('REQUESTED', 'CONFIRMED')
mapper.select: SELECT R.ID, S.NAME AS SERVICE_NAME, S.CATEGORY AS SERVICE_CATEGORY, S.DURATION_MINUTES, R.CUSTOMER_NAME, R.CUSTOMER_EMAIL, R.CUSTOMER_PHONE, R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME, R.NO_SHOW_POLICY_AGREED, R.STATUS, R.MEMO FROM MB_RESERVATION R JOIN MB_SERVICE_ITEM S ON S.ID = R.SERVICE_ID ORDER BY R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME DESC

SELECT R.ID, S.NAME AS SERVICE_NAME, S.CATEGORY AS SERVICE_CATEGORY, S.DURATION_MINUTES, R.CUSTOMER_NAME, R.CUSTOMER_EMAIL, R.CUSTOMER_PHONE, R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME, R.NO_SHOW_POLICY_AGREED, R.STATUS, R.MEMO FROM MB_RESERVATION R JOIN MB_SERVICE_ITEM S ON S.ID = R.SERVICE_ID ORDER BY R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT R.ID, S.NAME AS SERVICE_NAME, S.CATEGORY AS SERVICE_CATEGORY, S.DURATION_MINUTES, R.CUSTOMER_NAME, R.CUSTOMER_EMAIL, R.CUSTOMER_PHONE, R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME, R.NO_SHOW_POLICY_AGREED, R.STATUS, R.MEMO FROM MB_RESERVATION R JOIN MB_SERVICE_ITEM S ON S.ID=R.SERVICE_ID WHERE R.ID=#{reservationId}

SELECT R.ID, S.NAME AS SERVICE_NAME, S.CATEGORY AS SERVICE_CATEGORY, S.DURATION_MINUTES, R.CUSTOMER_NAME, R.CUSTOMER_EMAIL, R.CUSTOMER_PHONE, R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME, R.NO_SHOW_POLICY_AGREED, R.STATUS, R.MEMO FROM MB_RESERVATION R JOIN MB_SERVICE_ITEM S ON S.ID=R.SERVICE_ID WHERE R.STATUS IN ('REQUESTED','CONFIRMED') AND R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME >= SYSTIMESTAMP AND R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME < SYSTIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '2' DAY ORDER BY R.RESERVATION_DATE_TIME
mapper.update: UPDATE MB_RESERVATION SET STATUS = #{status}, MEMO = CASE WHEN #{rejectionReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} IS NULL THEN MEMO ELSE '[거절] ' || #{rejectionReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} END, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{reservationId}
